heygen_script:
Welcome to Mary's Alterations, your premier destination for Formalwear alterations, bridesmaid dresses, prom dresses.

What sets us apart: Specialist in military dress uniforms - 'sweet lady'

Visit us today and experience the quality that has made us a local favorite.

Mary's Alterations - Quality Service, Every Time.
